title: Monday.com Answers: How to export a board with updates
excerpt:

posts.author: Kayla-monday.com (Kayla Kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone! Let’s talk about exporting boards to Excel!

Every time you export a board to Excel, you can choose whether you’d like to export just the board itself, or the board including updates from the Updates Section!

To export a board, click the 3-dot menu at the top right-hand corner, click “More settings”, and then “Export board to Excel”, like this:

1600×613 124 KB

Now, you’ll see a pop-up window asking if you’d like to include updates! If you tick the box and then click “Export”, you will create an Excel file containing all of the data in your board in one tab, and all of your board’s updates in a second tab in the same spreadsheet.

1600×733 109 KB
